{{Quote|That…was…AWESOME!|Evan, after Aiwha Squad rescued him from a spider droid|<ref name="Orders" />}}
'''Evan''' was a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] farmboy from the planet [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]].

==Biography==
Evan's parents were killed during a battle between [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] and [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] forces. Their deaths left Evan an orphan, and he went into hiding where he was discovered by the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] in [[Aiwha Squad]]. While traveling with Aiwha Squad, [[Sarge (clone commando)|Sarge]] received [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], and Evan watched in shock as the squad killed [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Traavis]].

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Wow! A real Jedi.|Evan on seeing [[Traavis]]|<ref name="Orders" />}}
Evan was unwilling to leave his home with the clone commandos, but did warm up to them. In contrast to being terrified at the confrontation with a homing spider droid, he said it was "awesome". He was fascinated by the Jedi and shocked at the byproduct of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]].

==Behind the scenes==
Evan was created by [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]] for the short story [[Orders (comic story)|''Orders'']], which was featured in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 4|fourth volume]] of the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']] [[Star Wars comic books|trade paperbacks]]. He was drawn by [[Rick Lacy]]. Evan received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.
